message:
fix: make AI JSON extraction more robust to prevent card creation failures (#3615)

Fixes #3610 — AI Card Creation fails with "Could not extract valid JSON
from AI response." The extraction logic now:

- Handles fenced code blocks with or without the json language tag
- Strips trailing commas (common AI model quirk)
- Scans for ALL JSON objects/arrays in the response, not just the first
- Tries direct parse first as a fast path
- Fixes escape-character tracking to only apply inside strings

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
